title: Tesla appoints Airbnb co-founder Joe Gebbia to its board
text: Tesla Inc has appointed Joe Gebbia, the co-founder of Airbnb (NASDAQ:ABNB), to its board as an independent member, according to a regulatory filing.  Gebbia's appointment to the electric car maker's board follows the departure of Oracle chair and chief technology officer Larry Ellison in June.

title: Tesla appoints Airbnb co-founder to board
text: Tesla has appointed Airbnb co-founder and billionaire Joe Gebbia to its board of directors, according to a securities filing. Gebbia, a designer who co-founded Airbnb, officially joined the board September 25 as an independent director.

title: Tesla adds Airbnb co-founder Gebbia to board
text: Tesla Inc said on Wednesday that Joseph Gebbia, co-founder of vacation rental platform Airbnb Inc , has joined the electric vehicle maker's board.

title: Analysis: Enjoy your Airbnb — just don't forget to do the laundry and take out the trash
text: Anyone who's stayed in an Airbnb knows the experience can be a roll of the dice. Anything can happen when you roll up to your rental. That's part of the charm — you might be pleasantly surprised by a free bottle of wine waiting for you in the kitchen, or you might have an adventure just trying to unlock the door with the weird skeleton key that you had to dig out from behind a tree in the backyard.
